title: Xenosia macrorhiza
taxonomy: Xenosia macrorhiza is classified in the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. This family includes a wide range of species, from shrubs to trees, and is found in many parts of the world. Xenosia macrorhiza is further classified in the subfamily Faboideae, which is a subfamily within the Fabaceae family. The species is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other legume species. Further classification at the genus and species levels may be necessary for a more precise understanding of Xenosia macrorhiza's relationships within the plant kingdom.
